title: Philips Hair Clippers, Series 5000 Trim-n-Flow PRO Technology Hair Clipper, Fully Washable with Self-Sharpening Stainless Steel Blades, Corded, UK 3-Pin Plug - HC5630/13
features: Achieve a fast, sharp cut, time after time: Dual Cut technology cuts hair two times faster; the added turbo power function further boosts cutting speed
Trim-n-flow PRO technology allows cut hair to flow away from the blades during use through its innovative comb design
Self- sharpening titanium blades for ultimate durability and long-lasting performance
Precise length control: 28 easy lock-in length settings from 0.5 mm to 28 mm. The Philips Hair Clipper includes a stubble comb of 2mm for short hair cut or to style your beard
90 minutes run time of cordless use after a 1-hour charge or use plugged in (UK 2-pin Bathroom Plug)
description: Product Description Get an even haircut 2x faster* thanks to Dual Cut and Trim-n-Flow Pro technology. The new comb design prevents hair from getting stuck in the comb, so you can finish your style in one go. Select with the zoom wheel 28 length settings: 0.5 to 28mm. Corded and cordless functionality. 100% washable.* Versus its Philips predecessor. Safety Warning Please note: use the device dry only. Do not put it under running water. Do not leave the device near water sources. Do not use the device on the skin except for beard trimming. Keep the device out of reach of children. Do not let children use the device. Make sure the device is completely dry before use. Avoid contact with the blades. Do not drop the device or bump it against hard objects. Follow the cleaning and maintenance instructions in the manual. Box Contains Cleaning brush. 1 beard comb, 2 hair combs (long and short). Soft pouch for storage. User manual.Guarantee. See more
